name: tradingagents
description: Substanz Edition v2.1 — 4 analysts + 13 famous-investor personas + bull/bear debate + trader + risk manager + DCF/Kelly/ATR/Sharpe quant tools + backtester + read-only Next.js dashboard. v2.1 adds Macro (FRED/VIX), Smart-Money (Congress trades, 13F filings, options flow, ETF holdings), Forward-Looking (earnings transcripts, Finnhub analyst recs/calendar), Sentiment (PRAW + FinBERT) and Quant (vectorbt + empyrical + mlfinlab) layers — 37 MCP tools total.

fds_api_token.title: Financial Datasets API key (optional)
fds_api_token.description: Optional — premium fundamentals via https://financialdatasets.ai. Leave empty to use only Alpha Vantage + yfinance.

finnhub_api_token.title: Finnhub API key (optional)
finnhub_api_token.description: Free 60/min at https://finnhub.io — for analyst recommendations + earnings/IPO calendar.

reddit_client_id.title: Reddit OAuth Client ID (optional)
reddit_client_id.description: Register app at https://www.reddit.com/prefs/apps — for `reddit_mentions()` PRAW tool.

reddit_user_agent.title: Reddit User-Agent (optional)
reddit_user_agent.description: Required by Reddit API. Format: `tradingagents/2.1 by /u/yourusername`. NOT sensitive but include for completeness.
